objective: Bind issuer-level price-to-sales construction, complete share-class market value, and one deterministic execution listing without approving product semantics.
claim_ceiling: accepted E0 shared-contract repair pending E1 frozen-corpus evidence; no approved P/S semantics, TOPT execution mapping, factor implementation, strategy activation, or release-readiness claim

requirements: queued S4 registration is merged to main
the implementation PR pins its exact current main base SHA
an independent reviewer is assigned before E0 acceptance
an active integration lease covers the shared research contract path
issue #155 contains the exact manifest path and SHA-256

dependencies.artifact: approved issuer P/S and strategy candidate identity policy

required_strata: one issuer with two security share classes and two price listings
one issuer candidate with one immutable execution listing
complete issuer market-cap aggregation and PIT P/S policy
duplicate issuer, wrong subject kind, duplicate component, and incomplete coverage rejection
canonical round-trip under reordered candidates and components

release_activation.reason: S4 repairs a provisional contract only; #59/#21 approval and later candidate acceptance remain mandatory

negative_controls: duplicate issuer candidate or market-value component
wrong issuer, security, or listing subject kind
unknown P/S rule or mutable coordinate
candidate-universe, P/S policy, or strategy hash mismatch

output.type: issuer P/S and strategy candidate identity contract repair

invalidation: P/S construction, candidate identity, or execution-listing vocabulary changes create a new batch revision
shared contract path lease expiry blocks the implementation PR
candidate semantic values or approvals do not raise this E0 evidence ceiling
rollback: Revert the S4 contract repair and tests together; no accepted release manifest or runtime registry may reference this provisional contract.
